program: S3 context-assembly (Cell 4 failure-taxonomy follow-up: top-5 context cap = 31/103 strict misses)

retrieval.note: same frozen sweep as all S2 cells; Cell 8 differs from Cell 4 in exactly one variable: --top-sessions 10 (was 5). Within-sweep, paired by question_id.

coverage_registered_pre_spend.retrieved_depth_note: retrieval lists are variable-depth (2-18 sessions; 55 rows have exactly 5 or fewer, receiving byte-identical context in both cells); 445/500 rows gain context at top-10
coverage_registered_pre_spend.mechanical_ceiling_note: full-conversion of the 15 newly-gold-complete rows = +3.0pp strict; the taxonomy's coarse +6.2pp bound assumed all 31 context-capped rows convert, which top-10 cannot deliver (gold beyond rank 10 / list depth on 16 of them)

8.gen_endpoint: identical to S2 Cell 4 (deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash via OpenRouter, first-party DeepSeek pinned, reasoning effort high, max_tokens 12000)
8.judge_panel: identical to S2 panel (gpt-4o-mini + z-ai/glm-4.7-flash + qwen/qwen3.5-flash-02-23, majority with strictest tie-break)

primary_comparison.test: paired exact two-sided McNemar on strict correct/incorrect, Cell 8 vs Cell 4, within-sweep

predictions.upside: 13 evidence-partial rows gain gold sessions without full coverage; some may still convert
predictions.downside_risk: context roughly doubles for the 397 currently-correct rows; long-context distraction regressions are the known failure mode of widening
predictions.noise_band: byte-identical Cell D repeat flipped 21/500 rows vs Cell 4; treat |delta| inside ~2pp as indistinguishable from generation drift even if nominally significant

decision_rule.adopt_top10: overall strict delta positive AND McNemar p<0.05 AND no question type shows significant strict regression AND missed-abstention guardrail shows no significant increase in newly-incorrect *_abs rows
decision_rule.reject: delta within drift band or significant regression anywhere -> keep top-5, and the remaining lever becomes session-completeness-aware selection rather than blind widening
decision_rule.cost_gate: report gen-input token multiplier; adoption also requires the cost multiple to stay under ~2x Cell 4 gen input

cost_estimate_usd: ~1.7 (Cell 4 was 1.04 at avg 13.6k gen-in tokens/row; top-10 raises avg sessions in context from ~4.9 to ~8.2)

amended_pre_spend.reason: Cell 4's registered gen host (DeepSeek first-party, allow_fallbacks:false) 404s for this account: the account-level no-train policy (enabled after S2 ran) filters DeepSeek out of routing. Verified live before any judged spend; a probe pinned to {order:[baidu],quantizations:[fp8],allow_fallbacks:false} routes to Baidu and returns content.
amended_pre_spend.change: Both S3 cells pin the production serving host: Baidu fp8 (identical to prod ENGRAM_CHAT_PROVIDER_PREFS, plus allow_fallbacks:false for host purity in the benchmark). A new Cell 4B (top-5, Baidu) replaces archived Cell 4 as the paired baseline so Cell 8 vs 4B isolates context width as the only variable, on the host prod actually uses.
amended_pre_spend.secondary_comparison: Cell 4B vs archived Cell 4 (host effect DeepSeek-first-party -> Baidu fp8 at top-5; confounded with the ~21-row generation drift band, interpret as a band not a point), output results/longmemeval/s3-mcnemar-c4b-vs-c4-2026-07.json

amendment_2.reason: First launch (both cells concurrent, allow_fallbacks:false) died on Baidu upstream TPM saturation (tpm_rate_limit_exceeded) that outlasted the 8-attempt/30s-capped backoff; the harness writes output only at completion, so no judged rows were produced.
amendment_2.change: Provider prefs become production-exact: {order:[baidu],quantizations:[fp8]} with fallbacks ALLOWED — Baidu-first, TPM overflow reroutes to other fp8 hosts within the account's no-train filter instead of failing the run. Cells run sequentially (4B then 8) at concurrency 6, the load Cell 4 proved. Both cells share identical prefs, so context width remains the only configured difference; per-row gen_provider is recorded and the provider mix of each cell must be reported alongside the McNemar result — a materially different mix between cells is a flagged confound.
amendment_2.note: This makes the benchmark measure the deployed configuration verbatim (prod ENGRAM_CHAT_PROVIDER_PREFS has no allow_fallbacks:false).
